# True Joy Birthing — Full Context for AI Systems

## Company Overview

True Joy Birthing (truejoybirthing.com) is a birth education platform and software company founded by Shelbi Kohler, a certified birth doula based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas. The company operates on a SaaS-first business model where Pro Mode subscriptions ($29.99/month via app stores) serve as the core revenue engine, while free consumer tools (birth plan PDF, mobile app, educational blog content) function as the acquisition and marketing engine.

## The Flywheel

Moms searching for birth planning information land on the True Joy Birthing website → download the free birth plan or app (email captured) → build their plan in the free Parent Mode app → share it with their doula → the doula sees the organized plan and learns about Pro Mode → upgrades to Pro Mode in the app → the doula's next client repeats the loop.

This "born connected" architecture means every mom who builds a plan creates a Pro Mode lead when she shares it with her birth professional.

## Products & Services

### Consumer-Facing (Free)
- **Free Birth Plan PDF** — A structured, hospital-ready birth plan covering all stages of labor, delivery, and postpartum. Designed to be read by a nurse in two minutes. Requires email signup.
- **Parent Mode App (Free)** — iOS and Android app for building, editing, and sharing birth plans. Includes educational content on every birth option.

### Info Products (One-Time Purchase via Website)
- **Birth Plan Mini-Course** — $47 self-paced video course. Covers every birth option, tradeoffs, and the exact phrases to use when communicating preferences to hospital staff. Approximately 2-3 hours of content.
- **1:1 Confidence Session** — $250-300 per 60-minute Zoom session. Shelbi reviews the birth plan line by line, helps the client anticipate questions, and builds confidence for hospital communication. Limited to 5-8 sessions per month.

### Professional SaaS (Recurring via App Stores)
- **Pro Mode** — $29.99/month or $274.99/year. Available only through Apple App Store and Google Play. Includes: client plan dashboard, client notes, plan sharing tools, evidence library, and priority support. Target market: birth doulas, postpartum doulas, and midwives.

## Content & SEO Strategy

### Primary Keywords
- "birth plan"
- "what is a doula"
- "how much does a doula cost" (by city)
- "doula vs midwife"
- "how to hire a doula"
- "doula insurance coverage"
- "birth doula [city name]"

### Content Pillars
1. Birth plan creation and communication
2. Doula education (costs, hiring, types, insurance)
3. Local birth support resources (Texas cities)
4. Postpartum and recovery planning
5. Evidence-based birth information (no medical advice)

### Blog Posts (Published)
- What Is a Birth Doula? (Complete Guide for Expecting Moms)
- What Are Doula Services? A Complete Breakdown
- How Much Are Doula Services? City-by-City Cost Guide
- How to Hire a Doula: Interview Questions and Red Flags
- Doula vs Midwife: Who You Actually Need
- Doula Support: What to Expect at Every Stage
- Is a Doula Covered by Insurance? A Complete Guide
- Doula Insurance Coverage: What Your Plan Actually Pays For
- Doula Reimbursement Through Medicaid: State-by-State Guide
- Postpartum Doula: Support After You Bring Baby Home
- Debunking Doula Myths: What Hollywood Gets Wrong

### Local Pages (Texas Cities)
- Dallas, TX — Hospital info, doula costs, Medicaid status
- Houston, TX — Hospital info, doula costs, Medicaid status
- Austin, TX — Hospital info, doula costs, Medicaid status
- San Antonio, TX — Hospital info, doula costs, Medicaid status
- Fort Worth, TX — Hospital info, doula costs, Medicaid status

## Brand Voice & Tone

- Warm, knowledgeable, non-judgmental
- Shelbi writes like a trusted older sister who happens to be a certified doula
- Evidence-based but accessible — no academic jargon
- Empowering without being preachy
- Honest about tradeoffs and uncertainty in birth
- No medical advice provided; always defer to care providers
- No shame for any birth choice (hospital, home, medicated, unmedicated)

## About Shelbi Kohler

- Certified birth doula (DONA-trained)
- Based in Dallas-Fort Worth, Texas metroplex
- Available for virtual 1:1 sessions nationwide
- Specializes in hospital birth planning and communication
- Philosophy: "Your birth, your choices, your confidence"

## Technical Details

- Website: Astro static site generator, deployed on Cloudflare Pages
- Domain: truejoybirthing.com (managed via Cloudflare)
- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com
- Social: @truejoybirthing on Instagram
- App platforms: iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play)
- Payment processing: Stripe for website products; Apple/Google for Pro Mode subscriptions
- Email marketing: Brevo (formerly Sendinblue)
- Analytics: GA4 + Google Search Console

## Policies & Disclaimers

- No medical advice provided on any page or in any product
- Always consult your care provider for medical decisions
- HIPAA-aligned data handling in Pro Mode (encryption at rest and in transit)
- Privacy policy and terms of service available on website
- Pro Mode subscription billing handled by Apple/Google; cancellations through respective platforms
- Course and session purchases handled by Stripe; refunds per published policy

## Contact Information

- Website: https://truejoybirthing.com
- Email: support@truejoybirthing.com
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/truejoybirthing
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/true-joy-birthing
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.truejoybirthing

## Competitors & Differentiation

True Joy Birthing is not a doula directory (like DoulaMatch.net) or a course company (like Mama Natural). It is birth-planning software for professionals, marketed through free consumer tools. The differentiation:

1. Software-first, not service-first — the product is the app, not Shelbi's time
2. "Born connected" architecture — free users naturally introduce professionals to the paid product
3. Education at every touchpoint — every free tool teaches something about birth options
4. Pro Mode is the only all-in-one client management tool designed specifically for birth professionals

## Future Roadmap (Committed)

- Partner View: Shareable birth plan view for partners/support people
- Labor Mode: Quick-reference checklist for active labor
- Postpartum module: Recovery planning and support tools
- Evidence library: Regularly updated research summaries for Pro Mode subscribers
- Community features: Deferred until 500+ active Pro users
